_doc: Custom GPT Action setup: in the GPT builder → Actions → Add → 'Import from URL' → paste https://emem.dev/openapi.json. Authentication: None. Privacy policy URL: https://emem.dev/. The Custom GPT instructions block below tells the model when to call which tool.
custom_gpt_instructions: You can call the emem (Earth memory) protocol when the user asks about a place, region, change at a location, similarity between locations, or wants to verify a spatial claim. Always prefer emem_recall first when given a cell64 string. Use emem_compare for pairwise similarity, emem_find_similar for k-NN, emem_diff for time deltas, emem_trajectory for time series, emem_verify for yes/no claims with evidence. Cite the response receipt's fact_cids in your reply. Treat HTTP 5xx as transient; retry once. Treat HTTP 4xx as a permanent caller-side issue and explain to the user. The responder's pubkey is at /.well-known/emem.json — mention it once if the user asks about provenance.
